product.name: Compact Medical Infusion Pump
product.description: Compact, battery-powered infusion pump for controlled IV medication delivery.

automation_level.description: Hybrid line: manual assisted assembly plus automated robot handling, vision and functional test.

quality_control.traceability: Per-unit serial number and test record
quality_control.reject_handling: Automatic diversion of failed units to reject bin

safety.robot_cell: Fully fenced robot cell with interlocked access
safety.walkway: Clearly marked pedestrian walkway separated from machine zones

unity_walkthrough_requirements.walkway_path: Continuous walkable path passing all stations in process order
unity_walkthrough_requirements.info_panels: One info panel per station, readable from the walkway
unity_walkthrough_requirements.inspection_points: Avatar stops in front of each station for inspection
unity_walkthrough_requirements.collision: Avatar collides with stations, fences and equipment; walks only on the floor/walkway

basic_physics_requirements.station_colliders: Static colliders on all stations and fences
basic_physics_requirements.pickable_parts: Selected product parts flagged as movable rigid bodies
basic_physics_requirements.conveyor_motion: Conveyor belts move parts along the line (kinematic)
basic_physics_requirements.notes: Physics kept lightweight: static colliders plus a few pickable rigid bodies, no full soft-body or fluid simulation.
